title: USD/JPY
text: The ongoing Iran war and rising tensions in the Middle East may lead to a significant increase in risk aversion, potentially causing the USD/JPY to breach key support levels. Investors should be prepared for heightened volatility and potential safe-haven flows into the Japanese yen.

title: Inflation
text: Economists predict that inflation could soar to 6.4% by June, which may lead to a shift in monetary policy and impact currency markets, particularly for the USD and other currencies with high inflation sensitivity.

title: CNY
text: The PBoC is seen resisting strong appreciation of the CNY, which may lead to intervention in the foreign exchange market and impact USD/CNY and other related currency pairs.

title: Market Sentiment
text: The ongoing war in the Middle East and rising uncertainty are dominating market sentiment, with major US stock indices closing lower for the 5th week and the Nasdaq falling below 21,000 for the first time since August.

title: Geopolitical Risks
text: The Houthis in Yemen announcing their entry into the conflict and Trump's comments on Hormuz are adding to the geopolitical risks and uncertainty, which may lead to increased volatility in the foreign exchange market.
